title: Hellay's 3D Mace
description: changes mace's 2D model to a 3D model in hand and a 2D model in inventory
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a730452d7310e60d2bb9a1030ce3af903be747d.png)
# **About**
####  **This pack changes the mace's 2d model to be 3d in hand and 2d in inventory it is possible with changing core shaders thanks to [this github project](<https://github.com/ShockMicro/CorePerspectiveModels>)**
## **FAQ**
-  ### **What versions does it support?**
   **it supports 24w11a and above**
-  ### **Does it require any additional mods or resource packs?**
   **No , the pack works in vanilla just fine but note that the pack will not work with iris or      optifine shader packs if you use the normal version.For using Shader packs you SHOULD use the *Supports Shaders* version**
-  ### **Where can I report any issues that I have?**
   **You can communicate with me and report bugs and issues in the discord server**
-  ### **Can I modify this pack?**
   **Yes , if it's for personal use feel free to change anything you want.But if you want to publish the modified pack or put my pack in a modpack or showing it in a video pls mantion my name or put a link to my pack**
## **Discord server**
-  [**Hellay Designs**](<https://discord.gg/fmS6pf2EZN>)
